final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of the 三国赤壁之战 (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a cartoon/illustrated storybook aesthetic for children — exact illustration style is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge card layout with clear title at top, key points listed beside with punctuation, illustrated story section
Subject: must include the 三国赤壁之战 story as the central theme
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, engaging atmosphere suitable for children — exact tone is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include clear title (三国赤壁之战 or similar), key points with punctuation beside illustration
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve historical accuracy of 三国赤壁之战 story; must be child-friendly presentation
Avoid:
